    11→
    12→/// A theme preview widget showing sample components in the current theme.
    13→///
    14→/// Renders a grid/column of representative component samples for visually
    15→/// auditing theme changes. Useful for design systems and theme builders.
    16→///
    17→/// The widget wraps its content in an [OiTheme] provider so that all child
    18→/// components resolve tokens from the supplied [theme].
    19→class OiThemePreview extends StatelessWidget {
    20→  /// Creates an [OiThemePreview].
    21→  const OiThemePreview({
    22→    required this.theme,
    23→    this.showColors = true,
    24→    this.showTypography = true,
    25→    this.showSpacing = true,
    26→    this.showButtons = true,
    27→    this.showInputs = true,
    28→    this.showCards = true,
    29→    this.showBadges = true,
    30→    this.showProgress = true,
    31→    super.key,
    32→  });
    33→
    34→  /// The theme to preview.
    35→  final OiThemeData theme;
    36→
    37→  /// Whether to show the color palette section.
    38→  final bool showColors;
    39→
    40→  /// Whether to show the typography samples section.
    41→  final bool showTypography;
    42→
    43→  /// Whether to show the spacing scale section.
    44→  final bool showSpacing;
    45→
    46→  /// Whether to show button variant samples.
    47→  final bool showButtons;
    48→
    49→  /// Whether to show input samples.
    50→  final bool showInputs;
    51→
    52→  /// Whether to show card variants.
    53→  final bool showCards;
    54→
    55→  /// Whether to show badge variants.
    56→  final bool showBadges;
    57→
    58→  /// Whether to show progress indicators.
    59→  final bool showProgress;
    60→
    61→  @override
    62→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    63→    return OiTheme(
    64→      data: theme,
    65→      child: ColoredBox(
    66→        color: theme.colors.background,
    67→        child: SingleChildScrollView(
    68→          padding: EdgeInsets.all(theme.spacing.lg),
    69→          child: Column(
    70→            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    71→            children: [
    72→              if (showColors) _buildColorSection(),
    73→              if (showTypography) _buildTypographySection(),
    74→              if (showSpacing) _buildSpacingSection(),
    75→              if (showButtons) _buildButtonSection(),
    76→              if (showInputs) _buildInputSection(),
    77→              if (showCards) _buildCardSection(),
    78→              if (showBadges) _buildBadgeSection(),
    79→              if (showProgress) _buildProgressSection(),
    80→            ],
    81→          ),
    82→        ),
    83→      ),
    84→    );
    85→  }
    86→
    87→  // ── Sections ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    88→
    89→  Widget _buildColorSection() {
    90→    final colors = theme.colors;
    91→    return _Section(
    92→      title: 'Colors',
    93→      theme: theme,
    94→      child: Column(
    95→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
    96→        children: [
    97→          _buildSwatchRow('Primary', colors.primary),
    98→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.sm),
    99→          _buildSwatchRow('Accent', colors.accent),
   100→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.sm),
   101→          _buildSwatchRow('Success', colors.success),
   102→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.sm),
   103→          _buildSwatchRow('Warning', colors.warning),
   104→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.sm),
   105→          _buildSwatchRow('Error', colors.error),
   106→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.sm),
   107→          _buildSwatchRow('Info', colors.info),
   108→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.md),
   109→          Wrap(
   110→            spacing: theme.spacing.sm,
   111→            runSpacing: theme.spacing.sm,
   112→            children: [
   113→              _ColorChip(color: colors.background, label: 'background'),
   114→              _ColorChip(color: colors.surface, label: 'surface'),
   115→              _ColorChip(color: colors.surfaceHover, label: 'surfaceHover'),
   116→              _ColorChip(color: colors.surfaceActive, label: 'surfaceActive'),
   117→              _ColorChip(color: colors.overlay, label: 'overlay'),
   118→              _ColorChip(color: colors.text, label: 'text'),
   119→              _ColorChip(color: colors.textSubtle, label: 'textSubtle'),
   120→              _ColorChip(color: colors.textMuted, label: 'textMuted'),
   121→              _ColorChip(color: colors.border, label: 'border'),
   122→              _ColorChip(color: colors.borderFocus, label: 'borderFocus'),
   123→            ],
   124→          ),
   125→        ],
   126→      ),
   127→    );
   128→  }
   129→
   130→  Widget _buildSwatchRow(String label, OiColorSwatch swatch) {
   131→    return Row(
   132→      children: [
   133→        SizedBox(
   134→          width: 72,
   135→          child: Text(
   136→            label,
   137→            style: theme.textTheme.small.copyWith(color: theme.colors.text),
   138→          ),
   139→        ),
   140→        _ColorChip(color: swatch.base, label: 'base'),
   141→        SizedBox(width: theme.spacing.xs),
   142→        _ColorChip(color: swatch.light, label: 'light'),
   143→        SizedBox(width: theme.spacing.xs),
   144→        _ColorChip(color: swatch.dark, label: 'dark'),
   145→        SizedBox(width: theme.spacing.xs),
   146→        _ColorChip(color: swatch.muted, label: 'muted'),
   147→      ],
   148→    );
   149→  }
   150→
   151→  Widget _buildTypographySection() {
   152→    final tt = theme.textTheme;
   153→    final textColor = theme.colors.text;
   154→    return _Section(
   155→      title: 'Typography',
   156→      theme: theme,
   157→      child: Column(
   158→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
   159→        children: [
   160→          for (final entry in <String, TextStyle>{
   161→            'display': tt.display,
   162→            'h1': tt.h1,
   163→            'h2': tt.h2,
   164→            'h3': tt.h3,
   165→            'h4': tt.h4,
   166→            'body': tt.body,
   167→            'bodyStrong': tt.bodyStrong,
   168→            'small': tt.small,
   169→            'smallStrong': tt.smallStrong,
   170→            'tiny': tt.tiny,
   171→            'caption': tt.caption,
   172→            'code': tt.code,
   173→            'overline': tt.overline,
   174→            'link': tt.link,
   175→          }.entries)
   176→            Padding(
   177→              padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: theme.spacing.xs),
   178→              child: Text(
   179→                '${entry.key}: The quick brown fox',
   180→                style: entry.value.copyWith(color: textColor),
   181→              ),
   182→            ),
   183→        ],
   184→      ),
   185→    );
   186→  }
   187→
   188→  Widget _buildSpacingSection() {
   189→    final sp = theme.spacing;
   190→    return _Section(
   191→      title: 'Spacing',
   192→      theme: theme,
   193→      child: Wrap(
   194→        spacing: theme.spacing.sm,
   195→        runSpacing: theme.spacing.sm,
   196→        children: [
   197→          for (final entry in <String, double>{
   198→            'xs': sp.xs,
   199→            'sm': sp.sm,
   200→            'md': sp.md,
   201→            'lg': sp.lg,
   202→            'xl': sp.xl,
   203→            'xxl': sp.xxl,
   204→          }.entries)
   205→            _SpacingBlock(
   206→              label: '${entry.key} (${entry.value.toInt()})',
   207→              size: entry.value,
   208→              color: theme.colors.primary.base,
   209→            ),
   210→        ],
   211→      ),
   212→    );
   213→  }
   214→
   215→  Widget _buildButtonSection() {
   216→    return _Section(
   217→      title: 'Buttons',
   218→      theme: theme,
   219→      child: Wrap(
   220→        spacing: theme.spacing.sm,
   221→        runSpacing: theme.spacing.sm,
   222→        children: [
   223→          OiButton.primary(label: 'primary', onTap: () {}),
   224→          OiButton.secondary(label: 'secondary', onTap: () {}),
   225→          OiButton.outline(label: 'outline', onTap: () {}),
   226→          OiButton.ghost(label: 'ghost', onTap: () {}),
   227→          OiButton.destructive(label: 'destructive', onTap: () {}),
   228→          OiButton.soft(label: 'soft', onTap: () {}),
   229→        ],
   230→      ),
   231→    );
   232→  }
   233→
   234→  Widget _buildInputSection() {
   235→    return _Section(
   236→      title: 'Inputs',
   237→      theme: theme,
   238→      child: Column(
   239→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
   240→        children: [
   241→          const SizedBox(
   242→            width: 300,
   243→            child: OiTextInput(
   244→              label: 'Text Input',
   245→              placeholder: 'Type here...',
   246→            ),
   247→          ),
   248→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.sm),

   250→            width: 300,

   252→              label: 'Error Input',

   266→
   267→  Widget _buildCardSection() {
   268→    return _Section(
   269→      title: 'Cards',

   272→        spacing: theme.spacing.md,

   296→
   297→  Widget _buildBadgeSection() {

   317→  Widget _buildProgressSection() {

   337→// ── Private helper widgets ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   338→
   339→/// A titled section wrapper used within [OiThemePreview].
   340→class _Section extends StatelessWidget {
   341→  const _Section({
   342→    required this.title,
   343→    required this.theme,
   344→    required this.child,
   345→  });
   346→
   347→  /// The section heading text.
   348→  final String title;
   349→
   350→  /// The theme for styling.
   351→  final OiThemeData theme;
   352→
   353→  /// The section body.
   354→  final Widget child;
   355→
   356→  @override
   357→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   358→    return Padding(
   359→      padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: theme.spacing.xl),
   360→      child: Column(
   361→        crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
   362→        children: [
   363→          Text(
   364→            title,
   365→            style: theme.textTheme.h3.copyWith(color: theme.colors.text),
   366→          ),
   367→          SizedBox(height: theme.spacing.md),
   368→          child,
   369→        ],
   370→      ),
   371→    );
   372→  }
   373→}
   374→
   375→/// A small square chip that displays a [Color] with its [label].
   376→class _ColorChip extends StatelessWidget {
   377→  const _ColorChip({required this.color, required this.label});
   378→
   379→  /// The color to display.
   380→  final Color color;
   381→
   382→  /// A short descriptive label.
   383→  final String label;
   384→
   385→  @override

   200→  static Color _hexToColor(String hex) {

   486→  /// Converts a [FontWeight] to its integer value (100-900).
   487→  static int _fontWeightToInt(FontWeight weight) {
   488→    return weight.value;
   489→  }
   490→
   491→  /// Converts an integer to a [FontWeight], or returns null.
   492→  static FontWeight? _intToFontWeight(int? value) {
   493→    if (value == null) return null;
   494→    const weights = {
   495→      100: FontWeight.w100,
   496→      200: FontWeight.w200,
   497→      300: FontWeight.w300,
   498→      400: FontWeight.w400,
   499→      500: FontWeight.w500,
   500→      600: FontWeight.w600,
   501→      700: FontWeight.w700,
   502→      800: FontWeight.w800,
   503→      900: FontWeight.w900,
   504→    };
   505→    return weights[value];
   506→  }

   508→  /// Converts a [TextDecoration] to its string name.
   509→  static String _textDecorationToString(TextDecoration decoration) {
   510→    if (decoration == TextDecoration.underline) return 'underline';
   511→    if (decoration == TextDecoration.lineThrough) return 'lineThrough';
   512→    if (decoration == TextDecoration.overline) return 'overline';
   513→    return 'none';
   514→  }
   515→
   516→  /// Converts a string name to a [TextDecoration].
   517→  static TextDecoration? _stringToTextDecoration(String? name) {
   518→    switch (name) {
   519→      case 'underline':
   520→        return TextDecoration.underline;
   521→      case 'lineThrough':
   522→        return TextDecoration.lineThrough;
   523→      case 'overline':
   524→        return TextDecoration.overline;
   525→      case 'none':
   526→        return TextDecoration.none;
   527→      default:
   528→        return null;
   529→    }
   530→  }

   584→  /// Serializes a [BorderRadius] to its top-left radius value.

   589→  /// Deserializes a [BorderRadius] from a double value.
   590→  static BorderRadius _doubleToBorderRadius(double value) {
   591→    if (value == 0) return BorderRadius.zero;
   592→    return BorderRadius.all(Radius.circular(value));
   593→  }

   602→      'lg': _borderRadiusToDouble(radius.lg),
   603→      'xl': _borderRadiusToDouble(radius.xl),
   604→      'full': _borderRadiusToDouble(radius.full),

   643→  /// Serializes a list of [BoxShadow] to a list of maps.
   644→  static List<Map<String, dynamic>> _boxShadowListToMap(
   645→    List<BoxShadow> shadows,
   646→  ) {
   647→    return shadows.map((s) {
   648→      return <String, dynamic>{
   649→        'color': _colorToHex(s.color),
   650→        'offsetX': s.offset.dx,
   651→        'offsetY': s.offset.dy,
   652→        'blurRadius': s.blurRadius,
   653→        'spreadRadius': s.spreadRadius,
   654→      };
   655→    }).toList();
   656→  }
   657→
   658→  /// Deserializes a list of [BoxShadow] from a list of maps.
   659→  static List<BoxShadow> _boxShadowListFromMap(dynamic value) {
   660→    if (value is! List) return [];
   661→    return value.map((e) {
   662→      final map = e as Map<String, dynamic>;
   663→      return BoxShadow(
   664→        color: _hexToColor(map['color'] as String? ?? ''),
   665→        offset: Offset(
   666→          (map['offsetX'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0,
   667→          (map['offsetY'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0,
   668→        ),
   669→        blurRadius: (map['blurRadius'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0,
   670→        spreadRadius: (map['spreadRadius'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0,
   671→      );
   672→    }).toList();
   673→  }

   677→    return {

   679→      'xs': _boxShadowListToMap(shadows.xs),
   680→      'sm': _boxShadowListToMap(shadows.sm),
   681→      'md': _boxShadowListToMap(shadows.md),
   682→      'lg': _boxShadowListToMap(shadows.lg),

   686→  }

   688→  /// Deserializes an [OiShadowScale] from a map.
   689→  static OiShadowScale _shadowsFromMap(
   690→    Map<String, dynamic>? map,

   692→  ) {

   694→    return OiShadowScale(

   696→          ? _boxShadowListFromMap(map['none'])
   697→          : fallback.none,
   698→      xs: map.containsKey('xs')
   699→          ? _boxShadowListFromMap(map['xs'])
   700→          : fallback.xs,
   701→      sm: map.containsKey('sm')
   702→          ? _boxShadowListFromMap(map['sm'])
   703→          : fallback.sm,

   708→          ? _boxShadowListFromMap(map['lg'])
   709→          : fallback.lg,

   711→          ? _boxShadowListFromMap(map['xl'])

   850→  // ── OiDecorationTheme ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   851→
   852→  /// Serializes an [OiBorderStyle] to a map.
   853→  static Map<String, dynamic> _borderStyleToMap(OiBorderStyle border) {
   854→    return {
   855→      'lineStyle': border.lineStyle.name,
   856→      'color': _colorToHex(border.color),
   857→      'width': border.width,
   858→      if (border.borderRadius != null)
   859→        'borderRadius': _borderRadiusToDouble(border.borderRadius!),
   860→    };
   861→  }
   862→
   863→  /// Deserializes an [OiBorderStyle] from a map.
   864→  static OiBorderStyle _borderStyleFromMap(
   865→    Map<String, dynamic>? map,
   866→    OiBorderStyle fallback,
   867→  ) {
   868→    if (map == null) return fallback;
   869→    final lineStyleName = map['lineStyle'] as String?;
   870→    OiBorderLineStyle lineStyle;
   871→    switch (lineStyleName) {
   872→      case 'dashed':
   873→        lineStyle = OiBorderLineStyle.dashed;
   874→      case 'dotted':
   875→        lineStyle = OiBorderLineStyle.dotted;
   876→      default:
   877→        lineStyle = OiBorderLineStyle.solid;
   878→    }
   879→    return OiBorderStyle(
   880→      lineStyle: lineStyle,
   881→      color: _hexToColorOr(map['color'] as String?, fallback.color),
   882→      width: (map['width'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? fallback.width,
   883→      borderRadius: map['borderRadius'] != null
   884→          ? _doubleToBorderRadius((map['borderRadius'] as num).toDouble())
   885→          : fallback.borderRadius,
   886→    );
   887→  }
   888→
   889→  /// Serializes an [OiGradientStyle] to a map.
   890→  static Map<String, dynamic> _gradientStyleToMap(OiGradientStyle gradient) {
   891→    return {
   892→      'linear': gradient.linear,
   893→      'colors': gradient.colors.map(_colorToHex).toList(),
   894→      if (gradient.stops != null) 'stops': gradient.stops,
   895→    };
   896→  }
   897→
   898→  /// Deserializes an [OiGradientStyle] from a map.
   899→  static OiGradientStyle _gradientStyleFromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
   900→    final colors = (map['colors'] as List)
   901→        .map((c) => _hexToColor(c as String? ?? ''))
   902→        .toList();
   903→    final stops = (map['stops'] as List?)
   904→        ?.map((s) => (s as num).toDouble())
   905→        .toList();
   906→    return OiGradientStyle(
   907→      linear: map['linear'] as bool? ?? true,
   908→      colors: colors,
   909→      stops: stops,
   910→    );
   911→  }
   912→
   913→  /// Serializes an [OiDecorationTheme] to a map.
   914→  static Map<String, dynamic> _decorationToMap(OiDecorationTheme decoration) {
   915→    return {
   916→      'defaultBorder': _borderStyleToMap(decoration.defaultBorder),
   917→      'focusBorder': _borderStyleToMap(decoration.focusBorder),
   918→      'errorBorder': _borderStyleToMap(decoration.errorBorder),
   919→      'gradients': decoration.gradients.map(
   920→        (key, value) => MapEntry(key, _gradientStyleToMap(value)),
   921→      ),
   922→    };
   923→  }
   924→
   925→  /// Deserializes an [OiDecorationTheme] from a map.
   926→  static OiDecorationTheme _decorationFromMap(
   927→    Map<String, dynamic>? map,
   928→    OiDecorationTheme fallback,
   929→  ) {
   930→    if (map == null) return fallback;
   931→    final gradientsRaw = map['gradients'] as Map<String, dynamic>?;
   932→    final gradients = <String, OiGradientStyle>{};
   933→    if (gradientsRaw != null) {
   934→      for (final entry in gradientsRaw.entries) {
   935→        gradients[entry.key] = _gradientStyleFromMap(
   936→          entry.value as Map<String, dynamic>,
   937→        );
   938→      }
   939→    }
   940→    return OiDecorationTheme(
   941→      defaultBorder: _borderStyleFromMap(
   942→        map['defaultBorder'] as Map<String, dynamic>?,
   943→        fallback.defaultBorder,
   944→      ),
   945→      focusBorder: _borderStyleFromMap(
   946→        map['focusBorder'] as Map<String, dynamic>?,
   947→        fallback.focusBorder,
   948→      ),
   949→      errorBorder: _borderStyleFromMap(
   950→        map['errorBorder'] as Map<String, dynamic>?,
   951→        fallback.errorBorder,
   952→      ),
   953→      gradients: gradients.isNotEmpty ? gradients : fallback.gradients,
   954→    );
   955→  }

   957→  // ── Dart code generation helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────
   958→
   959→  /// Writes the color scheme fields as Dart source code.
   960→  static void _writeDartColorScheme(StringBuffer buf, OiColorScheme colors) {
   961→    void writeSwatch(String name, OiColorSwatch s) {
   962→      buf
   963→        ..writeln('    $name: OiColorSwatch(')
   964→        ..writeln('      base: ${_colorToDart(s.base)},')
   965→        ..writeln('      light: ${_colorToDart(s.light)},')
   966→        ..writeln('      dark: ${_colorToDart(s.dark)},')
   967→        ..writeln('      muted: ${_colorToDart(s.muted)},')
   968→        ..writeln('      foreground: ${_colorToDart(s.foreground)},')
   969→        ..writeln('    ),');
   970→    }
   971→
   972→    writeSwatch('primary', colors.primary);
   973→    writeSwatch('accent', colors.accent);
   974→    writeSwatch('success', colors.success);

content.text:
Perfect! I now have all the information needed. Let me provide a comprehensive report of the 18 files.

---

## COMPREHENSIVE FILE ANALYSIS REPORT

### 1. **lib/obers_ui.dart** (Main Library Export)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/obers_ui.dart`

**Purpose:** Central library file that exports all public APIs for the Obers UI design system.

**Key Features:**
- Organized section-based exports (Foundation Theme, Core Services, Persistence, Primitives, Components, Composites, Modules, Models, Utils, Tools)
- Exports theme tokens (colors, typography, spacing, shadows, animations, effects, decoration, component themes)
- Exports accessibility utilities (OiAccessibility, OiA11y)
- Exports all UI components organized by category (buttons, inputs, overlays, navigation, panels, data composites, media, social, workflow, visualization)
- Exports utility classes (theme preview, theme exporter, dynamic theme generation, playground)
- Selective hiding of specific types (e.g., `hide OiSelectionMode` from gallery and list_view exports)

---

### 2. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme_data.dart** (Master Theme Container)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme_data.dart`

**Key Classes:** `OiThemeData` (immutable)

**Key Properties:**
- `brightness` - Light or dark theme indicator
- `colors` - Complete semantic color palette (OiColorScheme)
- `textTheme` - Typography scale (OiTextTheme)
- `spacing` - Spacing scale tokens (OiSpacingScale)
- `radius` - Border radius tokens (OiRadiusScale)
- `shadows` - Shadow depth definitions (OiShadowScale)
- `animations` - Animation durations (OiAnimationConfig)
- `effects` - Interactive state effects (OiEffectsTheme)
- `decoration` - Border and gradient styles (OiDecorationTheme)
- `components` - Per-component theme overrides (OiComponentThemes)
- `fontFamily`, `monoFontFamily` - Optional font family overrides

**Key Methods:**
- `OiThemeData.light()` - Creates standard light theme
- `OiThemeData.dark()` - Creates standard dark theme
- `OiThemeData.fromBrand(Color color)` - Creates theme from brand color
- `copyWith()` - Produces modified copy
- `merge()` - Merges another theme into this one
- `lerp()` - Linear interpolation between two themes

**Notable Patterns:**
- All fields are final and marked @immutable
- Provides equality and hash code implementations
- Supports animation between themes via lerp

---

### 3. **lib/src/foundation/oi_accessibility.dart** (Accessibility Services)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/oi_accessibility.dart`

**Key Classes:**
- `OiA11yScope` - InheritedWidget providing accessibility context to descendants
- `OiA11y` - Static-only abstract class for accessibility utilities

**Key Methods:**
- `minTouchTarget(BuildContext)` - Returns minimum touch target size (48.0 on mobile, 0.0 on desktop)
- `announce(BuildContext, String, {bool assertive})` - Announces message to screen readers
- `reducedMotion(BuildContext)` - Checks if user requested reduced motion
- `highContrast(BuildContext)` - Checks for high-contrast mode
- `textScale(BuildContext)` - Gets current text scale factor
- `boldText(BuildContext)` - Checks if user requested bold text

**Notable Patterns:**
- All methods are static and use BuildContext to access platform/media information
- Integrates with Flutter's MediaQuery and SemanticsService
- Respects WCAG accessibility guidelines

---

### 4. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme.dart** (Theme Provider)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme.dart`

**Key Classes:**
- `OiTheme` - InheritedWidget providing OiThemeData to descendants
- `OiThemeScope` - Convenience wrapper for scoped theme overrides
- `OiBuildContextThemeExt` - BuildContext extension for theme access

**Key Methods:**
- `OiTheme.of(BuildContext)` - Gets nearest OiThemeData (throws if not found)
- `OiTheme.maybeOf(BuildContext)` - Gets nearest OiThemeData or null

**Extension Properties (OiBuildContextThemeExt):**
- `theme` - Full OiThemeData
- `colors` - OiColorScheme
- `textTheme` - OiTextTheme
- `spacing` - OiSpacingScale
- `radius` - OiRadiusScale
- `shadows` - OiShadowScale
- `effects` - OiEffectsTheme
- `animations` - OiAnimationConfig
- `decoration` - OiDecorationTheme
- `components` - OiComponentThemes

**Notable Patterns:**
- Provides convenient theme access throughout widget tree
- Extension methods simplify theme token retrieval
- Supports theme scope overriding for subtrees

---

### 5. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_color_scheme.dart** (Semantic Color Palette)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_color_scheme.dart`

**Key Class:** `OiColorScheme` (immutable)

**Color Token Properties:**
- Semantic swatches: `primary`, `accent`, `success`, `warning`, `error`, `info`
- Background/surface: `background`, `surface`, `surfaceHover`, `surfaceActive`, `surfaceSubtle`, `overlay`
- Text: `text`, `textSubtle`, `textMuted`, `textInverse`, `textOnPrimary`
- Borders: `border`, `borderSubtle`, `borderFocus`, `borderError`
- Glass effects: `glassBackground`, `glassBorder`
- Chart palette: `chart` (List<Color> of 8 colors)

**Key Methods:**
- `OiColorScheme.light()` - Light palette with blue primary, teal accent, light greys
- `OiColorScheme.dark()` - Dark palette with adjusted colors for dark backgrounds
- `OiColorScheme.lerp()` - Interpolates between two color schemes
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**
- Uses OiColorSwatch for semantic color groups
- Comprehensive equality checking including chart list comparison
- Separate light and dark factory constructors with appropriate tonal adjustments

---

### 6. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_text_theme.dart** (Typography Scale)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_text_theme.dart`

**Key Enum:** `OiLabelVariant`
- display, h1, h2, h3, h4, body, bodyStrong, small, smallStrong, tiny, caption, code, overline, link

**Key Class:** `OiTextTheme` (immutable)

**Text Style Properties (14 total):**
- Display: 56px, 700 weight, -0.5 letter spacing
- H1-H4: Progressively smaller headings (40px to 20px)
- Body variants: Standard (16px, 400) and bold (16px, 600)
- Small variants: 14px, regular and bold
- Tiny: 12px, 400 weight
- Caption: 12px with 1.4 line height
- Code: Monospace, 14px, 400 weight, 1.6 line height
- Overline: 11px, 600 weight, 1.5 letter spacing
- Link: 16px, underlined

**Key Methods:**
- `OiTextTheme.standard({fontFamily, monoFontFamily})` - Creates standard type scale
- `styleFor(OiLabelVariant)` - Gets TextStyle by variant
- `OiTextTheme.lerp()` - Interpolates between themes
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**
- All styles support optional font family and monospace font overrides
- Consistent line height ratios for readability
- Letter spacing adjustments on display and overline

---

### 7. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_spacing_scale.dart** (Spacing Tokens)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_spacing_scale.dart`

**Key Class:** `OiSpacingScale` (immutable)

**Spacing Properties:**
- Base scale: `xs` (4dp), `sm` (8dp), `md` (16dp), `lg` (24dp), `xl` (32dp), `xxl` (48dp)
- Page gutters: `pageGutterCompact` (16), `pageGutterMedium` (24), `pageGutterExpanded` (32), `pageGutterLarge` (40), `pageGutterExtraLarge` (48)

**Key Methods:**
- `OiSpacingScale.standard()` - 4dp base grid with doubling progression
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**
- 4dp base unit with doubling progression
- Separate page gutter values for responsive breakpoints
- Compact (<600dp), Medium (600-840dp), Expanded (840-1200dp), Large (1200-1600dp), ExtraLarge (>1600dp)

---

### 8. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_animation_config.dart** (Animation & Performance)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_animation_config.dart`

**Key Classes:**
- `OiAnimationConfig` (immutable)
- `OiPerformanceConfig` (immutable)

**OiAnimationConfig Properties:**
- `fast` - 150ms duration
- `normal` - 250ms duration (default)
- `slow` - 400ms duration
- `reducedMotion` - Boolean flag to suppress animations

**OiPerformanceConfig Properties:**
- `disableBlur` - Disable BackdropFilter blur effects
- `disableShadows` - Disable BoxShadow effects
- `reduceAnimations` - Halve animation durations
- `disableHalo` - Suppress glow effects
- `animationScale` - Multiplier for durations (1.0-0.5)

**Performance Tiers:**
- `OiPerformanceConfig.high()` - All effects enabled
- `OiPerformanceConfig.mid()` - Blur disabled (for web)
- `OiPerformanceConfig.low()` - All expensive effects disabled
- `OiPerformanceConfig.auto()` - Mid on web, high otherwise

---

### 9. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_component_themes.dart** (Component Overrides)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_component_themes.dart`

**Key Classes:** 16 per-component theme data classes + aggregator
- `OiButtonThemeData` - borderRadius, padding, textStyle
- `OiTextInputThemeData` - borderRadius, contentPadding, borderColor, focusBorderColor
- `OiSelectThemeData` - borderRadius, itemHeight
- `OiCardThemeData` - borderRadius, elevation, padding
- `OiDialogThemeData` - borderRadius, maxWidth
- `OiToastThemeData` - borderRadius, elevation
- `OiTooltipThemeData` - borderRadius, padding
- `OiTableThemeData` - headerHeight, rowHeight, borderColor
- `OiTabsThemeData` - indicatorColor, height
- `OiBadgeThemeData` - borderRadius
- `OiCheckboxThemeData` - size, borderRadius
- `OiSwitchThemeData` - width, height
- `OiSheetThemeData` - borderRadius
- `OiAvatarThemeData` - borderRadius
- `OiProgressThemeData` - height, borderRadius
- `OiSidebarThemeData` - width, compactWidth

**Aggregator Class:** `OiComponentThemes`
- Holds all 16 per-component overrides
- All fields are nullable
- `OiComponentThemes.empty()` factory constructor defaults all to null

**Notable Patterns:**
- Optional/nullable fields allow components to use built-in defaults
- Each component theme covers the most important visual properties
- Fallback pattern: null means use component's defaults

---

### 10. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_decoration_theme.dart** (Borders & Gradients)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_decoration_theme.dart`

**Key Classes:**
- `OiBorderLineStyle` enum - solid, dashed, dotted
- `OiBorderStyle` (immutable) - Complete border definition
- `OiGradientStyle` (immutable) - Linear/radial gradient definition
- `OiDecorationTheme` (immutable) - Aggregates borders and gradients

**OiBorderStyle:**
- Properties: lineStyle, color, width, gradient (optional), borderRadius (optional)
- Factories: `.solid()`, `.dashed()`, `.dotted()`, `.gradient()`, `.none()`
- Method: `toGradient()` for rendering

**OiGradientStyle:**
- Properties: linear (bool), colors (List<Color>), stops (optional), begin/end (linear), center/radius (radial)
- Factories: `.linear()`, `.radial()`
- Method: `toGradient()` returns Flutter Gradient

**OiDecorationTheme:**
- Properties: defaultBorder, focusBorder, errorBorder, gradients (Map<String, OiGradientStyle>)
- Factory: `.standard()` creates theme from primaryColor and errorColor

**Notable Patterns:**
- Comprehensive equality checking for color arrays
- State-based border definitions (default, focus, error)
- Gradient styles with named access

---

### 11. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_effects_theme.dart** (Interactive State Effects)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_effects_theme.dart`

**Key Classes:**
- `OiHaloStyle` (immutable) - Glow/halo effect as BoxShadow
- `OiInteractiveStyle` (immutable) - Background overlay + halo for a single state
- `OiEffectsTheme` (immutable) - Complete state effects

**OiHaloStyle:**
- Properties: color, spread (radius), blur
- Factories: `.from(Color, {intensity})` - creates halo with intensity scaling
- Method: `toBoxShadow()` for rendering

**OiInteractiveStyle:**
- Properties: backgroundOverlay (Color), halo (OiHaloStyle), scale (transform, default 1.0)
- Constants: `.none` - no visual change

**OiEffectsTheme:**
- State properties: hover, focus, active, disabled, selected, dragging
- Factory: `.standard({primaryColor})` - creates theme with primary color for focus/hover halos

**Standard Effects:**
- Hover: 10% black overlay, no halo
- Focus: Colored halo from primary, no background overlay
- Active: 26% black overlay, 0.97 scale (pressed effect)
- Disabled: No effects
- Selected: Primary color tinted background (8% alpha)
- Dragging: Primary color background (4% alpha), halo, 1.03 scale (lifted effect)

**Notable Patterns:**
- Halos use semi-transparent colors for intensity
- Scale transforms create visual feedback (press = shrink, drag = lift)
- State-based visual hierarchy

---

### 12. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_shadow_scale.dart** (Elevation System)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_shadow_scale.dart`

**Key Class:** `OiShadowScale` (immutable)

**Shadow Properties (7 levels):**
- `none` - No shadow (empty list)
- `xs` - Extra-small: 1px offset, 2px blur, subtle for small interactive elements
- `sm` - Small: 2px offset, 4px blur for dropdowns/tooltips
- `md` - Medium: 4px + 2px offsets, 8px + 4px blur (default for cards)
- `lg` - Large: 8px + 4px offsets, 16px + 8px blur for modals/popovers
- `xl` - Extra-large: 16px + 8px offsets, 32px + 16px blur for full-screen overlays
- `glass` - Glass effect: 24px blur for frosted surfaces

**Key Methods:**
- `OiShadowScale.standard()` - Light theme shadows (low alpha black)
- `OiShadowScale.dark()` - Dark theme shadows (higher opacity for visibility)
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**
- Each level uses layered shadows for smooth depth gradation
- Light theme uses alpha values 0x0D-0x1F (low opacity)
- Dark theme uses alpha values 0x29-0x3D (higher opacity for contrast)
- Multi-layer shadows create more realistic depth

---

### 13. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_color_swatch.dart** (Color Token Variants)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_color_swatch.dart`

**Key Class:** `OiColorSwatch` (immutable)

**Color Variants:**
- `base` - Primary/base shade
- `light` - Lighter variant (+20% lightness) for backgrounds/hover
- `dark` - Darker variant (-20% lightness) for pressed/active
- `muted` - Desaturated variant (40% saturation, +30% lightness) for disabled/subtle
- `foreground` - White or black for sufficient contrast over base

**Key Methods:**
- `OiColorSwatch.from(Color base)` - Derives all variants from base using HSL manipulation
- `OiColorSwatch.lerp()` - Interpolates between two swatches
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**
- HSL-based color manipulation for consistency
- WCAG contrast checking for foreground color (white if luminance < 0.35, else black)
- Automatic tonal variants without manual specification

---

### 14. **test/src/naming_conventions_test.dart** (Naming Convention Tests)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/test/src/naming_conventions_test.dart`

**Test Content:**
Two main test groups for boolean naming conventions:

1. **Test:** "no public bool field is prefixed with 'is' or 'has'"
   - Scans all `.dart` files in `lib/src/`
   - Uses regex pattern: `^\s*(?:required\s+)?(?:final\s+)?bool\s+(is[A-Z]|has[A-Z])`
   - Enforces descriptive adjectives instead (e.g., "enabled", "loading", "moreAvailable")

2. **Test:** "no constructor parameter uses this.isXxx or this.hasXxx"
   - Scans constructor parameter patterns
   - Uses regex: `\bthis\.(is[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*|has[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)\b`
   - Prevents is/has prefixes in constructor parameter names

**Notable Patterns:**
- Automated enforcement of naming conventions
- Checks entire codebase systematically
- Descriptive error messages guide developers

### 15. **lib/src/tools/oi_dynamic_theme.dart** (Dynamic Theme Generation)

- `fromSeedColor(Color, {brightness})` - Theme from seed color (delegates to fromColor)

**Notable Patterns:**

- Private constructor prevents instantiation

### 16. **lib/src/tools/oi_playground.dart** (Component Storybook)

**Notable Patterns:**

- Renders component variants for quick visual testing

---

### 17. **lib/src/tools/oi_theme_exporter.dart** (Theme Serialization/Export)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/tools/oi_theme_exporter.dart`

**Core Methods:**

**Color Handling:**

**Notable Patterns:**

## COMPREHENSIVE FILE ANALYSIS REPORT

### 1. **lib/obers_ui.dart** (Main Library Export)

- Exports theme tokens (colors, typography, spacing, shadows, animations, effects, decoration, component themes)

### 2. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme_data.dart** (Master Theme Container)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_theme_data.dart`

**Key Classes:** `OiThemeData` (immutable)

**Key Properties:**
- `brightness` - Light or dark theme indicator
- `colors` - Complete semantic color palette (OiColorScheme)
- `textTheme` - Typography scale (OiTextTheme)
- `spacing` - Spacing scale tokens (OiSpacingScale)
- `radius` - Border radius tokens (OiRadiusScale)
- `shadows` - Shadow depth definitions (OiShadowScale)
- `animations` - Animation durations (OiAnimationConfig)
- `effects` - Interactive state effects (OiEffectsTheme)
- `decoration` - Border and gradient styles (OiDecorationTheme)
- `components` - Per-component theme overrides (OiComponentThemes)
- `fontFamily`, `monoFontFamily` - Optional font family overrides

**Key Methods:**
- `OiThemeData.light()` - Creates standard light theme
- `OiThemeData.dark()` - Creates standard dark theme
- `OiThemeData.fromBrand(Color color)` - Creates theme from brand color
- `copyWith()` - Produces modified copy
- `merge()` - Merges another theme into this one
- `lerp()` - Linear interpolation between two themes

**Notable Patterns:**
- All fields are final and marked @immutable
- Provides equality and hash code implementations
- Supports animation between themes via lerp

### 3. **lib/src/foundation/oi_accessibility.dart** (Accessibility Services)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/oi_accessibility.dart`

- `OiA11y` - Static-only abstract class for accessibility utilities

**Key Methods:**
- `minTouchTarget(BuildContext)` - Returns minimum touch target size (48.0 on mobile, 0.0 on desktop)
- `announce(BuildContext, String, {bool assertive})` - Announces message to screen readers
- `reducedMotion(BuildContext)` - Checks if user requested reduced motion
- `highContrast(BuildContext)` - Checks for high-contrast mode
- `textScale(BuildContext)` - Gets current text scale factor
- `boldText(BuildContext)` - Checks if user requested bold text

**Notable Patterns:**
- All methods are static and use BuildContext to access platform/media information
- Integrates with Flutter's MediaQuery and SemanticsService
- Respects WCAG accessibility guidelines

### 11. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_effects_theme.dart** (Interactive State Effects)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_effects_theme.dart`

**Key Classes:**

- `OiInteractiveStyle` (immutable) - Background overlay + halo for a single state
- `OiEffectsTheme` (immutable) - Complete state effects

**OiHaloStyle:**
- Properties: color, spread (radius), blur
- Factories: `.from(Color, {intensity})` - creates halo with intensity scaling
- Method: `toBoxShadow()` for rendering

**OiInteractiveStyle:**
- Properties: backgroundOverlay (Color), halo (OiHaloStyle), scale (transform, default 1.0)
- Constants: `.none` - no visual change

**OiEffectsTheme:**
- State properties: hover, focus, active, disabled, selected, dragging
- Factory: `.standard({primaryColor})` - creates theme with primary color for focus/hover halos

**Standard Effects:**
- Hover: 10% black overlay, no halo
- Focus: Colored halo from primary, no background overlay
- Active: 26% black overlay, 0.97 scale (pressed effect)
- Disabled: No effects
- Selected: Primary color tinted background (8% alpha)
- Dragging: Primary color background (4% alpha), halo, 1.03 scale (lifted effect)

**Notable Patterns:**
- Halos use semi-transparent colors for intensity
- Scale transforms create visual feedback (press = shrink, drag = lift)
- State-based visual hierarchy

### 12. **lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_shadow_scale.dart** (Elevation System)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/lib/src/foundation/theme/oi_shadow_scale.dart`

**Key Class:** `OiShadowScale` (immutable)

**Shadow Properties (7 levels):**
- `none` - No shadow (empty list)
- `xs` - Extra-small: 1px offset, 2px blur, subtle for small interactive elements
- `sm` - Small: 2px offset, 4px blur for dropdowns/tooltips
- `md` - Medium: 4px + 2px offsets, 8px + 4px blur (default for cards)
- `lg` - Large: 8px + 4px offsets, 16px + 8px blur for modals/popovers
- `xl` - Extra-large: 16px + 8px offsets, 32px + 16px blur for full-screen overlays
- `glass` - Glass effect: 24px blur for frosted surfaces

**Key Methods:**
- `OiShadowScale.standard()` - Light theme shadows (low alpha black)
- `OiShadowScale.dark()` - Dark theme shadows (higher opacity for visibility)
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**
- Each level uses layered shadows for smooth depth gradation
- Light theme uses alpha values 0x0D-0x1F (low opacity)
- Dark theme uses alpha values 0x29-0x3D (higher opacity for contrast)
- Multi-layer shadows create more realistic depth

**Key Methods:**

- `OiColorSwatch.lerp()` - Interpolates between two swatches
- `copyWith()` - Creates modified copy

**Notable Patterns:**

### 14. **test/src/naming_conventions_test.dart** (Naming Convention Tests)

**File Path:** `/home/simonerich/Flutters/obers_ui/test/src/naming_conventions_test.dart`

**Test Content:**
Two main test groups for boolean naming conventions:

1. **Test:** "no public bool field is prefixed with 'is' or 'has'"
   - Scans all `.dart` files in `lib/src/`
   - Uses regex pattern: `^\s*(?:required\s+)?(?:final\s+)?bool\s+(is[A-Z]|has[A-Z])`
   - Enforces descriptive adjectives instead (e.g., "enabled", "loading", "moreAvailable")

2. **Test:** "no constructor parameter uses this.isXxx or this.hasXxx"
   - Scans constructor parameter patterns
   - Uses regex: `\bthis\.(is[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*|has[A-Z][a-zA-Z0-9]*)\b`
   - Prevents is/has prefixes in constructor parameter names

**Notable Patterns:**
- Automated enforcement of naming conventions
- Checks entire codebase systematically
- Descriptive error messages guide developers

1→import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
     2→import 'package:obers_ui/src/foundation/persistence/oi_settings_data.dart';
     3→
     4→/// The core interface that all settings persistence drivers implement.
     5→///
     6→/// A driver stores and retrieves serialized settings data. The interface
     7→/// is intentionally minimal — 4 methods cover all use cases.
     8→///
     9→/// Drivers are stateless; they do not cache. Caching is the responsibility
    10→/// of the widget using [OiSettingsMixin].
    11→///
    12→/// {@category Foundation}
    13→abstract class OiSettingsDriver {
    14→  /// Creates an [OiSettingsDriver].
    15→  const OiSettingsDriver();
    16→
    17→  /// Loads settings for the given [namespace] and optional [key].
    18→  ///
    19→  /// Returns `null` if no settings have been saved yet, or if the stored
    20→  /// data is corrupted or incompatible. Never throws.
    21→  ///
    22→  /// The [deserialize] function converts the raw `Map<String, dynamic>`
    23→  /// back into the typed settings object.
    24→  Future<T?> load<T extends OiSettingsData>({
    25→    required String namespace,
    26→    required T Function(Map<String, dynamic> json) deserialize,
    27→    String? key,
    28→  });
    29→
    30→  /// Saves settings for the given [namespace] and optional [key].
    31→  ///
    32→  /// The [serialize] function converts the typed settings object into a
    33→  /// JSON-encodable map.
    34→  Future<void> save<T extends OiSettingsData>({
    35→    required String namespace,
    36→    required T data,
    37→    required Map<String, dynamic> Function(T data) serialize,
    38→    String? key,
    39→  });
    40→
    41→  /// Deletes settings for the given [namespace] and optional [key].
    42→  ///
    43→  /// After deletion, [load] returns `null` and [exists] returns `false`.
    44→  Future<void> delete({required String namespace, String? key});
    45→
    46→  /// Returns `true` if settings exist for the given [namespace] and [key].
    47→  Future<bool> exists({required String namespace, String? key});
    48→
    49→  /// Computes the storage key from [namespace] and optional [key].
    50→  ///
    51→  /// Default format:
    52→  /// - Without key: `"$namespace"`
    53→  /// - With key: `"$namespace::$key"`
    54→  ///
    55→  /// Drivers may override this (e.g. for path-based REST APIs).
    56→  @protected
    57→  String resolveKey(String namespace, String? key) {
    58→    if (key == null) return namespace;
    59→    return '$namespace::$key';
    60→  }
    61→}
    62→

1→import 'package:flutter/widgets.dart';
     2→import 'package:obers_ui/src/foundation/persistence/oi_settings_driver.dart';
     3→
     4→/// An [InheritedWidget] that provides an [OiSettingsDriver] to the subtree.
     5→///
     6→/// Place this near the root of the widget tree to supply a shared driver:
     7→///
     8→/// ```dart
     9→/// OiSettingsProvider(
    10→///   driver: OiLocalStorageDriver(),
    11→///   child: MyApp(),
    12→/// )
    13→/// ```
    14→///
    15→/// Widgets can retrieve the driver with [OiSettingsProvider.of]:
    16→///
    17→/// ```dart
    18→/// final driver = OiSettingsProvider.of(context);
    19→/// ```
    20→///
    21→/// Returns `null` when no [OiSettingsProvider] is present in the tree.
    22→///
    23→/// {@category Foundation}
    24→class OiSettingsProvider extends InheritedWidget {
    25→  /// Creates an [OiSettingsProvider].
    26→  const OiSettingsProvider({
    27→    required this.driver,
    28→    required super.child,
    29→    super.key,
    30→  });
    31→
    32→  /// The driver made available to the subtree.
    33→  final OiSettingsDriver driver;
    34→
    35→  /// Returns the nearest [OiSettingsDriver] in the widget tree, or `null`
    36→  /// when no [OiSettingsProvider] is present.
    37→  static OiSettingsDriver? of(BuildContext context) {
    38→    final provider = context
    39→        .dependOnInheritedWidgetOfExactType<OiSettingsProvider>();
    40→    return provider?.driver;
    41→  }
    42→
    43→  @override
    44→  bool updateShouldNotify(OiSettingsProvider oldWidget) =>
    45→      driver != oldWidget.driver;
    46→}
    47→

    10→/// Button size options.
    11→///
    12→/// {@category Components}
    13→enum OiButtonSize {
    14→  /// A compact button (28/24/20 dp tall depending on density).
    15→  small,
    16→
    17→  /// The standard-sized button (36/32/28 dp tall depending on density).

    19→
    20→  /// A large prominent button (44/40/36 dp tall depending on density).
    21→  large,
    22→}
    23→
    24→/// Button visual style variants.
    25→///
    26→/// {@category Components}
    27→enum OiButtonVariant {
    28→  /// Filled with the primary brand colour.
    29→  primary,
    30→
    31→  /// Filled with the accent colour.
    32→  secondary,
    33→
    34→  /// Transparent with a visible border.
    35→  outline,
    36→
    37→  /// Transparent with no border.
    38→  ghost,
    39→
    40→  /// Filled with the error/destructive colour.
    41→  destructive,
    42→
    43→  /// Filled with a muted tint of the primary colour.
    44→  soft,
    45→}
    46→
    47→/// The position of an icon relative to its button label.
    48→///
    49→/// {@category Components}
    50→enum OiIconPosition {
    51→  /// Icon appears before the label.
    52→  leading,
    53→
    54→  /// Icon appears after the label.
    55→  trailing,
    56→}

    58→// ── Internal discriminator ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    59→
    60→enum _OiButtonKind { standard, icon, split, countdown, confirm }
    61→
    62→/// A fully-featured button component for the Obers UI design system.
    63→///
    64→/// [OiButton] supports six visual variants, three density-aware sizes, loading
    65→/// and disabled states, leading/trailing icons, full-width layout, and four
    66→/// specialised constructors:
    67→///
    68→/// - [OiButton.icon] — an icon-only square button.
    69→/// - [OiButton.split] — a main action paired with a dropdown trigger.
    70→/// - [OiButton.countdown] — auto-enables after a timer expires.
    71→/// - [OiButton.confirm] — requires a second tap to confirm a destructive action.
    72→///
    73→/// Uses [OiTappable] as the interaction layer; respects [OiDensityScope] for
    74→/// size calculations and reads all colours, spacing, and radii from the nearest
    75→/// [OiTheme].
    76→///
    77→/// ```dart
    78→/// OiButton.primary(
    79→///   label: 'Save',
    80→///   onTap: () => save(),
    81→/// )
    82→/// ```
    83→///
    84→/// {@category Components}
    85→class OiButton extends StatefulWidget {
    86→  // ── Standard constructor (private) ─────────────────────────────────────────
    87→
    88→  const OiButton._({
    89→    required _OiButtonKind kind,
    90→    this.label,
    91→    this.icon,
    92→    this.iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
    93→    this.variant = OiButtonVariant.primary,
    94→    this.size = OiButtonSize.medium,
    95→    this.onTap,
    96→    this.enabled = true,
    97→    this.loading = false,
    98→    this.fullWidth = false,
    99→    this.semanticLabel,
   100→    this.dropdown,
   101→    this.countdownSeconds,
   102→    this.confirmLabel,
   103→    this.onConfirm,
   104→    super.key,
   105→  }) : _kind = kind;
   106→
   107→  // ── Named variant constructors ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   108→
   109→  /// Creates a primary-variant button with the supplied [label].
   110→  const OiButton.primary({
   111→    required String label,
   112→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   113→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   114→    bool enabled = true,
   115→    bool loading = false,
   116→    bool fullWidth = false,
   117→    IconData? icon,
   118→    OiIconPosition iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
   119→    String? semanticLabel,
   120→    Key? key,
   121→  }) : this._(
   122→         kind: _OiButtonKind.standard,
   123→         label: label,
   124→         icon: icon,
   125→         iconPosition: iconPosition,
   126→         variant: OiButtonVariant.primary,
   127→         size: size,
   128→         onTap: onTap,
   129→         enabled: enabled,
   130→         loading: loading,
   131→         fullWidth: fullWidth,
   132→         semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
   133→         key: key,
   134→       );
   135→
   136→  /// Creates a secondary-variant button with the supplied [label].
   137→  const OiButton.secondary({
   138→    required String label,
   139→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   140→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   141→    bool enabled = true,
   142→    bool loading = false,
   143→    bool fullWidth = false,
   144→    IconData? icon,
   145→    OiIconPosition iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
   146→    String? semanticLabel,
   147→    Key? key,
   148→  }) : this._(
   149→         kind: _OiButtonKind.standard,
   150→         label: label,
   151→         icon: icon,
   152→         iconPosition: iconPosition,
   153→         variant: OiButtonVariant.secondary,
   154→         size: size,
   155→         onTap: onTap,
   156→         enabled: enabled,
   157→         loading: loading,
   158→         fullWidth: fullWidth,
   159→         semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
   160→         key: key,
   161→       );
   162→
   163→  /// Creates an outline-variant button with the supplied [label].
   164→  const OiButton.outline({
   165→    required String label,
   166→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   167→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   168→    bool enabled = true,
   169→    bool loading = false,
   170→    bool fullWidth = false,
   171→    IconData? icon,
   172→    OiIconPosition iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
   173→    String? semanticLabel,
   174→    Key? key,
   175→  }) : this._(
   176→         kind: _OiButtonKind.standard,
   177→         label: label,
   178→         icon: icon,
   179→         iconPosition: iconPosition,
   180→         variant: OiButtonVariant.outline,
   181→         size: size,
   182→         onTap: onTap,
   183→         enabled: enabled,
   184→         loading: loading,
   185→         fullWidth: fullWidth,
   186→         semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
   187→         key: key,
   188→       );
   189→
   190→  /// Creates a ghost-variant button with the supplied [label].
   191→  const OiButton.ghost({
   192→    required String label,
   193→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   194→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   195→    bool enabled = true,
   196→    bool loading = false,
   197→    bool fullWidth = false,
   198→    IconData? icon,
   199→    OiIconPosition iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
   200→    String? semanticLabel,
   201→    Key? key,
   202→  }) : this._(
   203→         kind: _OiButtonKind.standard,
   204→         label: label,
   205→         icon: icon,
   206→         iconPosition: iconPosition,
   207→         variant: OiButtonVariant.ghost,
   208→         size: size,
   209→         onTap: onTap,
   210→         enabled: enabled,
   211→         loading: loading,
   212→         fullWidth: fullWidth,
   213→         semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
   214→         key: key,
   215→       );
   216→
   217→  /// Creates a destructive-variant button with the supplied [label].
   218→  const OiButton.destructive({
   219→    required String label,
   220→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   221→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   222→    bool enabled = true,
   223→    bool loading = false,
   224→    bool fullWidth = false,
   225→    IconData? icon,
   226→    OiIconPosition iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
   227→    String? semanticLabel,
   228→    Key? key,
   229→  }) : this._(
   230→         kind: _OiButtonKind.standard,
   231→         label: label,
   232→         icon: icon,
   233→         iconPosition: iconPosition,
   234→         variant: OiButtonVariant.destructive,
   235→         size: size,
   236→         onTap: onTap,
   237→         enabled: enabled,
   238→         loading: loading,
   239→         fullWidth: fullWidth,
   240→         semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
   241→         key: key,
   242→       );
   243→
   244→  /// Creates a soft-variant button with the supplied [label].
   245→  const OiButton.soft({
   246→    required String label,
   247→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   248→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   249→    bool enabled = true,
   250→    bool loading = false,
   251→    bool fullWidth = false,
   252→    IconData? icon,
   253→    OiIconPosition iconPosition = OiIconPosition.leading,
   254→    String? semanticLabel,
   255→    Key? key,
   256→  }) : this._(
   257→         kind: _OiButtonKind.standard,
   258→         label: label,
   259→         icon: icon,
   260→         iconPosition: iconPosition,
   261→         variant: OiButtonVariant.soft,
   262→         size: size,
   263→         onTap: onTap,
   264→         enabled: enabled,
   265→         loading: loading,
   266→         fullWidth: fullWidth,
   267→         semanticLabel: semanticLabel,
   268→         key: key,
   269→       );
   270→
   271→  // ── Special constructors ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   272→
   273→  /// Creates an icon-only button with a square aspect ratio.
   274→  ///
   275→  /// The button has equal padding on all sides; no label is shown.
   276→  const OiButton.icon({
   277→    required IconData icon,
   278→    required String label,
   279→    VoidCallback? onTap,
   280→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   281→    bool enabled = true,
   282→    OiButtonVariant variant = OiButtonVariant.ghost,
   283→    Key? key,
   284→  }) : this._(
   285→         kind: _OiButtonKind.icon,
   286→         icon: icon,
   287→         variant: variant,
   288→         size: size,
   289→         onTap: onTap,
   290→         enabled: enabled,
   291→         semanticLabel: label,
   292→         key: key,
   293→       );
   294→
   295→  /// Creates a split button combining a main action with a dropdown trigger.
   296→  ///
   297→  /// The main [label] fires [onTap]; the chevron area shows [dropdown].
   298→  const OiButton.split({
   299→    required String label,
   300→    required VoidCallback onTap,
   301→    required Widget dropdown,
   302→    OiButtonVariant variant = OiButtonVariant.primary,
   303→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   304→    bool enabled = true,
   305→    Key? key,
   306→  }) : this._(
   307→         kind: _OiButtonKind.split,
   308→         label: label,
   309→         onTap: onTap,
   310→         dropdown: dropdown,
   311→         variant: variant,
   312→         size: size,
   313→         enabled: enabled,
   314→         key: key,
   315→       );
   316→
   317→  /// Creates a countdown button that auto-enables after [seconds] seconds.
   318→  ///
   319→  /// The button is disabled while the countdown is running and shows the
   320→  /// remaining time in the label.
   321→  const OiButton.countdown({
   322→    required String label,
   323→    required VoidCallback onTap,
   324→    required int seconds,
   325→    OiButtonVariant variant = OiButtonVariant.primary,
   326→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   327→    Key? key,
   328→  }) : this._(
   329→         kind: _OiButtonKind.countdown,
   330→         label: label,
   331→         onTap: onTap,
   332→         countdownSeconds: seconds,
   333→         variant: variant,
   334→         size: size,
   335→         key: key,
   336→       );
   337→
   338→  /// Creates a confirm button that requires two taps to fire [onConfirm].
   339→  ///
   340→  /// The first tap shows [confirmLabel] as a confirmation prompt; the second
   341→  /// tap calls [onConfirm].
   342→  const OiButton.confirm({
   343→    required String label,
   344→    required String confirmLabel,
   345→    required VoidCallback onConfirm,
   346→    OiButtonVariant variant = OiButtonVariant.destructive,
   347→    OiButtonSize size = OiButtonSize.medium,
   348→    Key? key,
   349→  }) : this._(
   350→         kind: _OiButtonKind.confirm,
   351→         label: label,
   352→         confirmLabel: confirmLabel,
   353→         onConfirm: onConfirm,
   354→         variant: variant,
   355→         size: size,
   356→         key: key,
   357→       );
   358→
   359→  // ── Fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   360→
   361→  /// The internal discriminator for which kind of button this is.
   362→  final _OiButtonKind _kind;
   363→
   364→  /// The primary label text.
   365→  final String? label;
   366→
   367→  /// An optional icon displayed alongside the label.
   368→  final IconData? icon;
   369→
   370→  /// The position of [icon] relative to [label].
   371→  final OiIconPosition iconPosition;
   372→
   373→  /// The visual style variant.
   374→  final OiButtonVariant variant;
   375→
   376→  /// The size tier.
   377→  final OiButtonSize size;
   378→
   379→  /// Called when the button is tapped.
   380→  final VoidCallback? onTap;
   381→
   382→  /// Whether the button responds to interactions.
   383→  final bool enabled;
   384→
   385→  /// Whether to show a loading indicator in place of the content.
   386→  final bool loading;
   387→
   388→  /// Whether the button expands to fill its parent's width.
   389→  final bool fullWidth;
   390→
   391→  /// Accessibility label announced by screen readers.
   392→  final String? semanticLabel;
   393→
   394→  /// The dropdown widget shown by a split button.
   395→  final Widget? dropdown;
   396→
   397→  /// The initial countdown value in seconds for a countdown button.
   398→  final int? countdownSeconds;
   399→
   400→  /// The label shown after the first tap of a confirm button.
   401→  final String? confirmLabel;
   402→
   403→  /// The callback fired on the second tap of a confirm button.
   404→  final VoidCallback? onConfirm;
   405→
   406→  @override
   407→  State<OiButton> createState() => _OiButtonState();
   408→}
   409→
   410→// ── State ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   411→
   412→class _OiButtonState extends State<OiButton> {
   413→  // ── Confirm state ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   414→  bool _confirmPending = false;
   415→
   416→  // ── Split dropdown state ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
   417→  bool _dropdownVisible = false;
   418→
   419→  // ── Countdown state ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   420→  int _remaining = 0;
   421→  Timer? _countdownTimer;
   422→
   423→  @override
   424→  void initState() {
   425→    super.initState();
   426→    if (widget._kind == _OiButtonKind.countdown &&
   427→        widget.countdownSeconds != null) {
   428→      _remaining = widget.countdownSeconds!;
   429→      _startCountdown();
   430→    }
   431→  }
   432→
   433→  @override
   434→  void didUpdateWidget(OiButton oldWidget) {
   435→    super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   436→    if (widget._kind == _OiButtonKind.countdown &&
   437→        widget.countdownSeconds != oldWidget.countdownSeconds) {
   438→      _countdownTimer?.cancel();
   439→      _remaining = widget.countdownSeconds ?? 0;
   440→      if (_remaining > 0) _startCountdown();
   441→    }
   442→  }
   443→
   444→  @override
   445→  void dispose() {
   446→    _countdownTimer?.cancel();
   447→    super.dispose();
   448→  }
   449→
   450→  void _startCountdown() {
   451→    _countdownTimer = Timer.periodic(const Duration(seconds: 1), (_) {
   452→      if (!mounted) return;
   453→      setState(() {
   454→        _remaining--;
   455→        if (_remaining <= 0) {
   456→          _remaining = 0;
   457→          _countdownTimer?.cancel();
   458→        }
   459→      });
   460→    });
   461→  }
   462→
   463→  // ── Size helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   464→
   465→  double _buttonHeight(OiDensity density) {
   466→    switch (widget.size) {
   467→      case OiButtonSize.small:
   468→        switch (density) {
   469→          case OiDensity.comfortable:
   470→            return 28;
   471→          case OiDensity.compact:
   472→            return 24;
   473→          case OiDensity.dense:
   474→            return 20;
   475→        }
   476→      case OiButtonSize.medium:
   477→        switch (density) {
   478→          case OiDensity.comfortable:
   479→            return 36;
   480→          case OiDensity.compact:
   481→            return 32;
   482→          case OiDensity.dense:
   483→            return 28;
   484→        }
   485→      case OiButtonSize.large:
   486→        switch (density) {
   487→          case OiDensity.comfortable:
   488→            return 44;
   489→          case OiDensity.compact:
   490→            return 40;
   491→          case OiDensity.dense:
   492→            return 36;
   493→        }
   494→    }
   495→  }
   496→
   497→  double _iconSize() {
   498→    switch (widget.size) {
   499→      case OiButtonSize.small:
   500→        return 14;
   501→      case OiButtonSize.medium:
   502→        return 16;
   503→      case OiButtonSize.large:
   504→        return 18;
   505→    }
   506→  }
   507→
   508→  double _fontSize() {
   509→    switch (widget.size) {
   510→      case OiButtonSize.small:
   511→        return 12;
   512→      case OiButtonSize.medium:
   513→        return 14;
   514→      case OiButtonSize.large:
   515→        return 16;
   516→    }
   517→  }
   518→
   519→  double _hPadding(BuildContext context) {
   520→    final sp = context.spacing;
   521→    switch (widget.size) {
   522→      case OiButtonSize.small:
   523→        return sp.sm;
   524→      case OiButtonSize.medium:
   525→        return sp.md;
   526→      case OiButtonSize.large:
   527→        return sp.lg;
   528→    }
   529→  }
   530→
   531→  // ── Colour helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   532→
   533→  Color _backgroundColor(BuildContext context, OiButtonVariant variant) {
   534→    final c = context.colors;
   535→    switch (variant) {
   536→      case OiButtonVariant.primary:
   537→        return c.primary.base;
   538→      case OiButtonVariant.secondary:
   539→        return c.accent.base;
   540→      case OiButtonVariant.outline:
   541→        return const Color(0x00000000); // transparent
   542→      case OiButtonVariant.ghost:
   543→        return const Color(0x00000000);
   544→      case OiButtonVariant.destructive:
   545→        return c.error.base;
   546→      case OiButtonVariant.soft:
   547→        return c.primary.muted;
   548→    }
   549→  }
   550→
   551→  Color _foregroundColor(BuildContext context, OiButtonVariant variant) {
   552→    final c = context.colors;
   553→    switch (variant) {
   554→      case OiButtonVariant.primary:
   555→        return c.primary.foreground;
   556→      case OiButtonVariant.secondary:
   557→        return c.accent.foreground;
   558→      case OiButtonVariant.outline:
   559→        return c.text;
   560→      case OiButtonVariant.ghost:
   561→        return c.text;
   562→      case OiButtonVariant.destructive:
   563→        return c.error.foreground;
   564→      case OiButtonVariant.soft:
   565→        return c.primary.base;
   566→    }
   567→  }
   568→
   569→  // ── Build helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   570→
   571→  BoxDecoration _decoration(
   572→    BuildContext context,
   573→    OiButtonVariant variant, {
   574→    BorderRadius? borderRadius,
   575→  }) {
   576→    final bg = _backgroundColor(context, variant);
   577→    final themeRadius = context.components.button?.borderRadius;
   578→    final effectiveRadius = borderRadius ?? themeRadius ?? context.radius.sm;
   579→    return BoxDecoration(
   580→      color: bg,
   581→      borderRadius: effectiveRadius,
   582→      border: variant == OiButtonVariant.outline
   583→          ? Border.all(color: context.colors.border)
   584→          : null,
   585→    );
   586→  }
   587→
   588→  Widget _buildLoadingIndicator(Color color) {
   589→    return OiPulse(
   590→      child: SizedBox(
   591→        width: 16,
   592→        height: 16,
   593→        child: DecoratedBox(
   594→          decoration: BoxDecoration(
   595→            color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.7),
   596→            shape: BoxShape.circle,
   597→          ),
   598→        ),
   599→      ),
   600→    );
   601→  }
   602→
   603→  Widget _buildContent(
   604→    BuildContext context, {
   605→    required String? label,
   606→    required IconData? icon,
   607→    required OiIconPosition iconPosition,
   608→    required Color foreground,
   609→    required bool loading,
   610→  }) {
   611→    if (loading) {
   612→      return _buildLoadingIndicator(foreground);
   613→    }
   614→
   615→    final iconWidget = icon != null
   616→        ? Padding(
   617→            padding: EdgeInsets.only(
   618→              right: (iconPosition == OiIconPosition.leading && label != null)
   619→                  ? context.spacing.xs
   620→                  : 0,
   621→              left: (iconPosition == OiIconPosition.trailing && label != null)
   622→                  ? context.spacing.xs
   623→                  : 0,
   624→            ),
   625→            child: Icon(icon, size: _iconSize(), color: foreground),
   626→          )
   627→        : null;
   628→
   629→    final labelWidget = label != null
   630→        ? Text(
   631→            label,
   632→            style: TextStyle(
   633→              fontSize: _fontSize(),
   634→              fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
   635→              color: foreground,
   636→              height: 1,
   637→            ),
   638→            maxLines: 1,
   639→            overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
   640→          )
   641→        : null;
   642→
   643→    if (iconWidget == null && labelWidget != null) return labelWidget;
   644→    if (iconWidget != null && labelWidget == null) return iconWidget;
   645→    if (iconWidget == null && labelWidget == null) return const SizedBox();
   646→
   647→    final children = iconPosition == OiIconPosition.leading
   648→        ? [iconWidget!, labelWidget!]
   649→        : [labelWidget!, iconWidget!];
   650→
   651→    return Row(
   652→      mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
   653→      mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
   654→      children: children,
   655→    );
   656→  }
   657→
   658→  // ── Build ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   659→
   660→  @override
   661→  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   662→    switch (widget._kind) {
   663→      case _OiButtonKind.icon:
   664→        return _buildIconButton(context);
   665→      case _OiButtonKind.split:
   666→        return _buildSplitButton(context);
   667→      case _OiButtonKind.countdown:
   668→        return _buildCountdownButton(context);
   669→      case _OiButtonKind.confirm:
   670→        return _buildConfirmButton(context);
   671→      case _OiButtonKind.standard:
   672→        return _buildStandardButton(context);
   673→    }
   674→  }
   675→
   676→  Widget _buildStandardButton(BuildContext context) {
   677→    final density = OiDensityScope.of(context);
   678→    final height = _buttonHeight(density);
   679→    final hPad = _hPadding(context);
   680→    final foreground = _foregroundColor(context, widget.variant);
   681→    final decoration = _decoration(context, widget.variant);
   682→    final isActive = widget.enabled && !widget.loading;
   683→
   684→    Widget button = OiTappable(
   685→      onTap: widget.onTap,
   686→      enabled: isActive,
   687→      semanticLabel: widget.semanticLabel ?? widget.label,
   688→      child: Container(
   689→        height: height,
   690→        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: hPad),
   691→        decoration: decoration,
   692→        child: Center(
   693→          child: _buildContent(
   694→            context,
   695→            label: widget.label,
   696→            icon: widget.icon,
   697→            iconPosition: widget.iconPosition,
   698→            foreground: foreground,
   699→            loading: widget.loading,
   700→          ),
   701→        ),
   702→      ),
   703→    );
   704→
   705→    if (widget.fullWidth) {
   706→      button = SizedBox(width: double.infinity, child: button);
   707→    }
   708→    return button;
   709→  }
   710→
   711→  Widget _buildIconButton(BuildContext context) {
   712→    final density = OiDensityScope.of(context);
   713→    final height = _buttonHeight(density);
   714→    final foreground = _foregroundColor(context, widget.variant);
   715→    final decoration = _decoration(context, widget.variant);
   716→    final isActive = widget.enabled;
   717→
   718→    return OiTappable(
   719→      onTap: widget.onTap,
   720→      enabled: isActive,
   721→      semanticLabel: widget.semanticLabel,
   722→      child: Container(
   723→        width: height,
   724→        height: height,
   725→        decoration: decoration,
   726→        child: Center(
   727→          child: Icon(widget.icon, size: _iconSize(), color: foreground),
   728→        ),
   729→      ),
   730→    );
   731→  }
   732→
   733→  Widget _buildSplitButton(BuildContext context) {
   734→    final density = OiDensityScope.of(context);
   735→    final height = _buttonHeight(density);
   736→    final hPad = _hPadding(context);
   737→    final foreground = _foregroundColor(context, widget.variant);
   738→    final bgColor = _backgroundColor(context, widget.variant);
   739→    final borderRadius =
   740→        context.components.button?.borderRadius ?? context.radius.sm;
   741→
   742→    final leftRadius = BorderRadius.only(
   743→      topLeft: borderRadius.topLeft,
   744→      bottomLeft: borderRadius.bottomLeft,
   745→    );
   746→    final rightRadius = BorderRadius.only(
   747→      topRight: borderRadius.topRight,
   748→      bottomRight: borderRadius.bottomRight,
   749→    );
   750→
   751→    final mainPart = OiTappable(
   752→      onTap: widget.onTap,
   753→      enabled: widget.enabled,
   754→      child: Container(
   755→        height: height,
   756→        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: hPad),
   757→        decoration: BoxDecoration(color: bgColor, borderRadius: leftRadius),
   758→        child: Center(
   759→          child: Text(
   760→            widget.label ?? '',
   761→            style: TextStyle(
   762→              fontSize: _fontSize(),
   763→              fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
   764→              color: foreground,
   765→              height: 1,
   766→            ),
   767→          ),
   768→        ),
   769→      ),
   770→    );
   771→
   772→    final chevronPart = OiTappable(
   773→      onTap: widget.enabled
   774→          ? () => setState(() => _dropdownVisible = !_dropdownVisible)
   775→          : null,
   776→      enabled: widget.enabled,
   777→      child: Container(
   778→        height: height,
   779→        width: height,
   780→        decoration: BoxDecoration(
   781→          color: bgColor,
   782→          borderRadius: rightRadius,
   783→          border: Border(
   784→            left: BorderSide(color: foreground.withValues(alpha: 0.3)),
   785→          ),
   786→        ),
   787→        child: Center(
   788→          child: Icon(
   789→            const IconData(0xe5c5, fontFamily: 'MaterialIcons'),
   790→            size: _iconSize(),
   791→            color: foreground,
   792→          ),
   793→        ),
   794→      ),
   795→    );
   796→
   797→    final row = Row(
   798→      mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
   799→      children: [mainPart, chevronPart],
   800→    );
   801→
   802→    return OiFloating(
   803→      visible: _dropdownVisible,
   804→      alignment: OiFloatingAlignment.bottomEnd,
   805→      anchor: row,
   806→      child: widget.dropdown ?? const SizedBox(),
   807→    );
   808→  }
   809→
   810→  Widget _buildCountdownButton(BuildContext context) {
   811→    final isExpired = _remaining <= 0;
   812→    final displayLabel = isExpired
   813→        ? widget.label ?? ''
   814→        : '${widget.label ?? ''} ($_remaining)';
   815→
   816→    final density = OiDensityScope.of(context);
   817→    final height = _buttonHeight(density);
   818→    final hPad = _hPadding(context);
   819→    final foreground = _foregroundColor(context, widget.variant);
   820→    final decoration = _decoration(context, widget.variant);
   821→
   822→    return OiTappable(
   823→      onTap: widget.onTap,
   824→      enabled: isExpired,
   825→      child: Container(
   826→        height: height,
   827→        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: hPad),
   828→        decoration: decoration,
   829→        child: Center(
   830→          child: Text(
   831→            displayLabel,
   832→            style: TextStyle(
   833→              fontSize: _fontSize(),
   834→              fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
   835→              color: foreground,
   836→              height: 1,
   837→            ),
   838→            maxLines: 1,
   839→            overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
   840→          ),
   841→        ),
   842→      ),
   843→    );
   844→  }
   845→
   846→  Widget _buildConfirmButton(BuildContext context) {
   847→    final density = OiDensityScope.of(context);
   848→    final height = _buttonHeight(density);
   849→    final hPad = _hPadding(context);
   850→
   851→    final activeVariant = _confirmPending
   852→        ? OiButtonVariant.destructive
   853→        : widget.variant;
   854→    final displayLabel = _confirmPending
   855→        ? (widget.confirmLabel ?? widget.label ?? '')
   856→        : (widget.label ?? '');
   857→    final foreground = _foregroundColor(context, activeVariant);
   858→    final decoration = _decoration(context, activeVariant);
   859→
   860→    return OiTappable(
   861→      onTap: () {
   862→        if (_confirmPending) {
   863→          setState(() => _confirmPending = false);
   864→          widget.onConfirm?.call();
   865→        } else {
   866→          setState(() => _confirmPending = true);
   867→        }
   868→      },
   869→      child: Container(
   870→        height: height,
   871→        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: hPad),
   872→        decoration: decoration,
   873→        child: Center(
   874→          child: Text(
   875→            displayLabel,
   876→            style: TextStyle(
   877→              fontSize: _fontSize(),
   878→              fontWeight: FontWeight.w500,
   879→              color: foreground,
   880→              height: 1,
   881→            ),
   882→            maxLines: 1,
   883→            overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
   884→          ),
   885→        ),
   886→      ),
   887→    );
   888→  }
   889→}
